description: Verify adding a new todo item works on demo.playwright.dev/todomvc/

steps.description: Locate the new-todo input field (placeholder 'What needs to be done?')
Type 'Buy groceries' into the new-todo input
Press Enter to submit the todo
Verify the text 'Buy groceries' appears as a list item in the todo list, and the input field is cleared

description: Verify marking a todo as complete applies the completed state

steps.description: Add a new todo with the text 'Test item' by typing it into the new-todo input and pressing Enter
Click the round checkbox to the left of the 'Test item' todo to mark it complete
Verify the 'Test item' list item now has the CSS class 'completed' (or visually shows as struck-through), and the footer count of items left decreases accordingly

description: Verify deleting a todo removes it from the list

steps.description: Add a new todo with the text 'Delete me' by typing it into the new-todo input and pressing Enter
Hover over the 'Delete me' todo so the X (destroy) button becomes visible, then click it
Verify the 'Delete me' todo no longer appears in the list
